## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm run validate`.
- [ ] I ran `npm run package:webstore` if runtime files changed.
- [ ] I did not add host permissions, content scripts, remote executable code, CRX packaging, or Web Store auto-submit logic.
- [ ] I updated docs or release notes if user-facing behavior changed.

## Manual audio test notes

Describe the browser, OS, audio device, media source, and listening duration tested.
